repair_cycle_notes: Cycle 1 (Option E full sub-batch 29a rerun): Initial 29a dispatched via oh-my-claudecode:writer per kickoff §4 directive. Writer reported DONE atoms=88 over p.281-285 but PDF p.281 ground truth verification (main session Read tool pages: '281') revealed catastrophic content miss — PDF p.281 contains Methods B/C/D for Example 3 (~54 atoms expected: 24-row + 10-row + 5-row partial relrec.xpt tables), but writer emitted only 11 atoms with Example 4 + Method A content (which is actually PDF p.282 territory). Root cause: cross-batch handoff prepend in main session dispatch propagated batch 28 retro over-claim ('L7 chain within Example 3 last sib used = 4 Method D') from `_progress_batch_28.json.rule_a.special_checks.new7_l7_chain_under_relating_examples` PASS verdict; actual root pdf_atoms.jsonl p.280 a038 ground truth shows last L7 emitted = Method A sib=1 only (Methods B/C/D for Example 3 NOT YET emitted). Writer naturally followed wrong handoff state → skipped Example 3 Methods B/C/D entirely → density alarm fired (88 atoms < 100 sub-batch floor + p.281=11/p.283=12/p.284=12 < 15 per-page floor). Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_29a.jsonl.pre-OptionE-content-mismatch.bak (87 lines preserving original under-atomized state as O-P1-93 evidence). Re-dispatched via oh-my-claudecode:executor with CORRECTED handoff state (Example 3 L7 last sib=1 Method A; Methods B/C/D MUST be emitted for p.281) + explicit Bash-heredoc append protocol per O-P1-89 round 5 codification + per-page expected atom counts inline. Recovery DONE 196 atoms over p.281-285 clean; HEADING chain validated correct (Method B sib=2 / Method C sib=3 / Method D sib=4 RESTART under Example 3 L6 sib=5 + Example 4 L6 sib=6 + Method A sib=1 RESTART under Example 4 + Method D sib=4 RESTART per Example + PC-PP Conclusions L6 sib=7 + PC-PP Suggestions L6 sib=8 + §6.3.6 L3 sib=6 + §6.3.7 L3 sib=7 + §6.3.7.1 L4 sib=1) — finding O-P1-93.

Cycle 2 (Option H 1-atom verbatim restore): Rule A reviewer slot #38 pr-review-toolkit:code-reviewer (AUDIT pivot 19th, pr family first burn, full-tool variant) flagged atom ig34_p0286_a005 (--SEQ TABLE_ROW Generic Morph/Phys Spec) as PARTIAL with R10 strict no-paraphrase violation: writer-family substituted 'Trial Summary domain' → 'Trial Summary dataset' in CDISC Notes column. Main session PDF p.286 cross-check confirmed ground truth = 'Trial Summary domain'. Rule B backup pdf_atoms_batch_29b.jsonl.pre-OptionH-rule-a-2fixes.bak preserved. Mechanical Python regex replace applied. Cross-validation table check: atom 10 ig34_p0290_a011 (MK MKSEQ TABLE_ROW) on same boilerplate template correctly uses 'domain' — confirms localized writer-family paraphrase rather than systemic — finding O-P1-94.

Cycle 3 (Option H 1-atom parent_section update): Rule A reviewer #38 flagged atom ig34_p0284_a009 (PC-PP Conclusions narrative SENTENCE) as PARTIAL with parent_section under-specified (used L5 bare '§6.3.5.9.3 Relating PP Records to PC Records' but PDF p.284 shows atom belongs under L6 'PC-PP Conclusions' heading).
